creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Am 10.02.2009, 13:35 Uhr, schrieb Sylvio César Teixeira Amorim  
 <scjamorim@bsd.com.br>:
 
 >     The package e2fsprogs, 1.41.4, is correct. I have in my laptop  
 > OpenSUSE
 > 11.1(ext3) and FreeBSD-8-Current. The size inode this package is auto,  
 > so I
 > no have problem in to mount the partition ext3, only I run command  
 > tune2fs
 > in OpenSUSE.
 >     No needed changed the package e2fsprogs.
 >
 
 JFTR: Barring presentation of actual evidence that the port upgrade breaks  
 anything, please apply. If we err, let's be on the safe side.
 
 -- 
 Matthias Andree
